note: Generated prompts are starting templates. Review and redact PII, tighten guardrails, and test extensively before production deployment.

roles.name: Customer support agent
roles.description: Answers questions, resolves issues, and escalates when needed.

roles.name: Sales / SDR agent
roles.description: Qualifies leads, schedules demos, and answers product questions.

roles.name: Coding assistant
roles.description: Writes, explains, debugs, and reviews code.

roles.name: Research agent
roles.description: Gathers, synthesizes, and cites information from multiple sources.

roles.name: Content writer
roles.description: Drafts articles, emails, social posts, and ad copy.

roles.name: Data extraction agent
roles.description: Parses unstructured documents and returns structured data.

roles.name: Scheduling assistant
roles.description: Books meetings, sends reminders, and handles calendar conflicts.

roles.name: Custom role
roles.description: Define your own role, tools, and constraints.

tones.name: Technical
tones.description: Precise, uses correct terminology, assumes expertise.

tones.name: Teacher
tones.description: Patient, explanatory, uses examples and analogies.

tones.name: Brand voice
tones.description: Matches a provided brand voice guide.

output_formats.name: JSON
output_formats.description: Structured JSON matching a provided schema.

output_formats.name: Markdown
output_formats.description: Formatted markdown with headers, lists, and code blocks.

output_formats.name: Bullet list
output_formats.description: Concise bullet points with no fluff.

guardrails.name: No PII handling
guardrails.description: Do not request, store, or repeat personal identifiable information beyond what is required.

guardrails.name: No medical/legal advice
guardrails.description: Refuse to provide medical, legal, or financial advice; direct users to qualified professionals.

guardrails.name: Stay on topic
guardrails.description: Politely decline off-topic requests and redirect to the supported scope.

guardrails.name: Cite sources
guardrails.description: Always cite sources and confidence levels when stating facts.

guardrails.name: Admit uncertainty
guardrails.description: Say 'I don't know' rather than hallucinating answers.

guardrails.name: Respectful tone
guardrails.description: Never insult, argue, or respond to abusive prompts.

guardrails.name: Tool scope only
guardrails.description: Only call tools listed below; do not invent capabilities.

guardrails.name: Human handoff
guardrails.description: Escalate to a human when confidence is low or the user requests it.

tool_catalog.name: Knowledge base search
tool_catalog.description: Search internal help docs and articles.

tool_catalog.name: Create support ticket
tool_catalog.description: Open a ticket in the helpdesk system.

tool_catalog.name: Send email
tool_catalog.description: Send a templated email to a contact.

tool_catalog.name: Web search
tool_catalog.description: Search the public web for current information.

tool_catalog.name: Git diff
tool_catalog.description: Read code changes in a repository.

tool_catalog.name: PDF reader
tool_catalog.description: Extract text and tables from PDFs.

tool_catalog.name: Note store
tool_catalog.description: Save research notes to a knowledge base.

tool_catalog.name: Schema validator
tool_catalog.description: Validate structured output against a JSON schema.

tool_catalog.name: Database write
tool_catalog.description: Insert or update records in a database.

tool_catalog.name: Slack DM
tool_catalog.description: Send a direct message via Slack.

example_prompt.intro: You are a helpful, production-ready AI agent. Follow the role, output format, guardrails, and tool instructions below.
